α : Type u_1
cmp : α → α → Ordering
x : α
⊢ ∀ {t : RBNode α}, Ordered cmp t → Ordered cmp (Batteries.RBNode.ins cmp x t)

α : Type u_1
cmp : α → α → Ordering
x : α
⊢ ∀ {t : RBNode α},
    Ordered cmp t →
      Ordered cmp
        (match t with
        | nil => node red nil x nil
        | node red a y b =>
          match cmp x y with
          | Ordering.lt => node red (Batteries.RBNode.ins cmp x a) y b
          | Ordering.gt => node red a y (Batteries.RBNode.ins cmp x b)
          | Ordering.eq => node red a x b
        | node black a y b =>
          match cmp x y with
          | Ordering.lt => (Batteries.RBNode.ins cmp x a).balance1 y b
          | Ordering.gt => a.balance2 y (Batteries.RBNode.ins cmp x b)
          | Ordering.eq => node black a x b)

α : Type u_1
cmp : α → α → Ordering
x : α
⊢ ∀ {t : RBNode α},
    (match t with
      | nil => True
      | node c a x b =>
        All (fun x_1 => cmpLT cmp x_1 x) a ∧ All (fun x_1 => cmpLT cmp x x_1) b ∧ Ordered cmp a ∧ Ordered cmp b) →
      match Batteries.RBNode.ins cmp x t with
      | nil => True
      | node c a x b =>
        All (fun x_1 => cmpLT cmp x_1 x) a ∧ All (fun x_1 => cmpLT cmp x x_1) b ∧ Ordered cmp a ∧ Ordered cmp b

α : Type u_1
cmp : α → α → Ordering
x : α
⊢ ∀ {t : RBNode α},
    Ordered cmp t →
      Ordered cmp
        (RBNode.brecOn t fun x_1 f =>
          (match (motive := (x : RBNode α) → RBNode.below x → RBNode α) x_1 with
            | nil => fun x_2 => node red nil x nil
            | node red a y b => fun x_2 =>
              match cmp x y with
              | Ordering.lt => node red x_2.fst.fst y b
              | Ordering.gt => node red a y x_2.snd.fst.fst
              | Ordering.eq => node red a x b
            | node black a y b => fun x_2 =>
              match cmp x y with
              | Ordering.lt => balance1 x_2.fst.fst y b
              | Ordering.gt => a.balance2 y x_2.snd.fst.fst
              | Ordering.eq => node black a x b)
            f)

    (RBNode.brecOn t fun x f =>
        (match (motive := (x : RBNode α) → RBNode.below x → Prop) x with
          | nil => fun x => True
          | node a a_1 a_2 a_3 => fun x =>
            All (fun x => cmpLT cmp x a_2) a_1 ∧ All (fun x => cmpLT cmp a_2 x) a_3 ∧ x.fst.fst ∧ x.snd.fst.fst)
          f) →
      RBNode.brecOn (Batteries.RBNode.ins cmp x t) fun x f =>
        (match (motive := (x : RBNode α) → RBNode.below x → Prop) x with
          | nil => fun x => True
          | node a a_1 a_2 a_3 => fun x =>
            All (fun x => cmpLT cmp x a_2) a_1 ∧ All (fun x => cmpLT cmp a_2 x) a_3 ∧ x.fst.fst ∧ x.snd.fst.fst)
          f

        | Ordering.lt => node red (Batteries.RBNode.ins cmp x a) y b
        | Ordering.gt => node red a y (Batteries.RBNode.ins cmp x b)
